title: Baby Three Lily Town 2nd Generation
features: 🖤 Darker Aesthetic: Features Baby Three rabbits with high-contrast, moody colors and dramatic textures, setting them apart from other collections.
📦 Random Selection: The thrill of the blind box! You will receive one randomly chosen plush figure from the V1 Lily Rabbit Town series.
🐇 Fluffy & Expressive: Each design boasts extra-long, soft plush fur and expressive faces, giving them unique character.
♣️ Mysterious Theme: Inspired by a 'rabbit town' setting, these designs bring a sophisticated, whimsical element to your collection.
🧸 Soft Collectible: Made from super-soft, high-quality plush material, perfect for display or cuddling.
description: Product description ♠️ Baby Three - Lily Rabbit Town Collection V1 - Random Selection 🐇 Enter the enchanting and slightly mysterious world of the Baby Three - Lily Rabbit Town Collection V1 plush blind box! This striking series features Baby Three transformed into stylish, fluffy rabbits with a darker, more dramatic aesthetic. Each box contains a randomly selected plush figure from this captivating collection. Will you find the unique black-and-white patterned rabbit, the fluffy white rabbit with pink accents, or the cool blue or yellow variants? The figures feature high-contrast colors and extra fluffy textures, making them truly stand out. Collect all the charming residents of Lily Rabbit Town! These soft, expressive plush figures are perfect for collectors who enjoy unique designs with a touch of playful mystery. 🖤 Darker Aesthetic: Features Baby Three rabbits with high-contrast, moody colors and dramatic textures, setting them apart from other collections. 📦 Random Selection: The thrill of the blind box! You will receive one randomly chosen plush figure from the V1 Lily Rabbit Town series. 🐇 Fluffy & Expressive: Each design boasts extra-long, soft plush fur and expressive faces, giving them unique character. ♣️ Mysterious Theme: Inspired by a 'rabbit town' setting, these designs bring a sophisticated, whimsical element to your collection. 🧸 Soft Collectible: Made from super-soft, high-quality plush material, perfect for display or cuddling. Note: Due to manufacturing and screen settings, the actual colors of the plush figures may vary slightly from the images shown. Directions 1. Open the box. 2. Remove the plush figure.
